subtitle_lines.speaker: Narrator
subtitle_lines.text: Isstvan's ash still falls. Loyalist survivors hold a broken line.

subtitle_lines.speaker: Macer Varren
subtitle_lines.text: No ceremony, captain. We cut through and extract what's left.

subtitle_lines.speaker: Player Captain
subtitle_lines.text: Advance in lockstep. We endure, and the warning endures with us.
